people.text: Alex wants beginner-friendly courses activities with clear instructions and practical support.
Jamie prefers social evening events connected with courses and meeting new people.
Taylor enjoys calm organised sessions with small groups and patient leaders.
Morgan needs inexpensive activities close to public transport after work.
Casey likes creative projects and wants personal feedback from experienced staff.

texts.text: Weekend family sessions are designed mainly for young children.
Small groups and [8]carefully organised sessions[/8] create a calm atmosphere. Leaders provide [8]patient step-by-step guidance[/8] throughout.
Members meet [7]on weekday evenings[/7] and spend time talking before activities begin. The group welcomes people interested in [7]meeting others[/7].
The venue offers [9]low-cost sessions[/9] near the central bus and train stations, making it useful for [9]people travelling after work[/9].
This programme prepares experienced users for competitions and public performances.
This programme introduces [6]basic courses skills[/6] through practical tasks. Teachers give [6]clear beginner support[/6] and answer questions carefully.
Advanced participants complete independent practice and weekly homework tasks.
Experienced instructors provide [10]individual feedback[/10] and encourage members to develop [10]creative personal projects[/10].

answers.explanation: Alex needs beginner support and practical instruction.
Casey wants creativity and personal feedback.
